name: Sangria
recipeIngredient: Juice of one orange and one lime (or lemon)
1 Strip orange peel or sliced orange for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour chilled wine into a pitcher over 1 cup of ice cubes.
2. Combine the orange and lemon juices with the sugar in a separate bowl.
3. Add the mixture from step 2 to the wine in the pitcher.
4. At serving time, stir in the chilled club soda.
5. Garnish with the orange peel or float orange slices on top of the Sangria.
6 servings
Diane Geary
